mapper.select: select count(0) from STANDARDIZE_OBJECTFIELD_REL where set_id=#{setId} and COLUMN_NAME=#{columnName}
select stand.* from standardize_object_relation ori INNER join standardize_object_relation stand on stand.parent_id = ori.id and ori.id=#{id} and rownum = 1
mapper.delete: delete from standardize_object_relation where id=#{id} and object_id=#{objectId}
mapper.select: select RECNO as recno,COLUMNNAME as columnName,FIELDCHINEENAME as fieldChineseName,GADSJ_FIELDID as gadsjFieldId, CREATETIME as createTime,UPDATETIME as updateTime from synlte.objectField where OBJECTID = #{objectId}
